# Visual Creative Output Sample — Infographic (Week 28)

**Generated by:** `/visual creative "Infographic thai kỳ tuần 28 cho Facebook post, brand màu xanh mint"`

**Status:** Ready to Export as JPG/PNG  
**Platform:** Facebook Post + Instagram Carousel + Pinterest Pin  
**Dimensions:** 1080×1350px (Instagram optimized)

---

## Creative Brief

**Platform & Dimensions:** Facebook Post (1200×628) / Instagram Square (1080×1080) / Pinterest (1000×1500)

**Mood Board:** Ấm áp, Giáo dục, Tin cậy

**Visual Concept:**
- Layout: Timeline/journey style — bên trái hình minh họa bé 28 tuần, bên phải 3 điểm phát triển
- Kiểu ảnh: Illustration (không ảnh người thật — safety)
- Màu chủ đạo: Xanh mint nhạt (#E8F5F0 background), xanh navy (#1B3A4B text), hồng nhạt (#FFD6E0 accent)
- Ánh sáng: Soft, warm lighting (illustration style)

**Text Overlay:**
- Headline to: "Bé 28 Tuần Tuổi"
- Subheading: "3 Điều Đang Xảy Ra Trong Bụng Bạn"
- Body: 3 key points with icons
- CTA: "📲 Đặt lịch khám → Link"
- Footer: "[Tên Bác Sĩ] • [SĐT Phòng Khám]"

**Dos:**
- Cute illustration of baby at 28 weeks (round face, closed eyes, curled position)
- Icons for each development point (ear for hearing, muscles for strength, etc.)
- Color-coded sections (each point different pastel color)
- Readable on mobile (minimum 12px font)

**Don'ts:**
- Avoid real ultrasound images (generic, clinical)
- Avoid photos of pregnant women (privacy concerns)
- Avoid medical jargon without explanation
- Avoid overly "cute" style (need professional appearance)

---

## AI Image Prompts

### Midjourney (for illustration style)

```
Cute illustrated baby at 28 weeks gestation in fetal position, 
medical infographic style, pastel mint green and navy color palette, 
soft warm lighting, educational poster design, flat design with subtle gradients, 
healthcare education aesthetic, professional medical illustration, 
--ar 4:3 --v 6
```

### DALL-E 3 (for infographic design)

```
Infographic: Pregnancy week 28 milestones illustration.
Style: flat design, minimal, pastel colors (mint, navy, soft pink).
Center: Cute illustrated baby in fetal position.
Right side: 3 labeled development points with icons.
Background: Pastel mint gradient.
Text: "Week 28 - What's Happening", clean typography, sans-serif.
Medical educational aesthetic, clean layout, healthcare branding.
```

### Canva AI (fastest option)

```
pregnancy week 28 development illustration, pastel mint colors, 
fetal development infographic, cute baby illustration, 
educational medical design, healthcare poster
```

## Design Specifications

### Layout Structure
```
┌─────────────────────────────┐
│   HEADER: "Bé 28 Tuần Tuổi"│
├─────────────────────────────┤
│  [BABY ILLUSTRATION] │ Point 1 │
│     (left)          │ Point 2 │
│                     │ Point 3 │
│                     │ (right) │
├─────────────────────────────┤
│  CTA BUTTON: "Đặt Lịch Khám" │
├─────────────────────────────┤
│  Footer: Doctor info + Contact│
└─────────────────────────────┘
```

### Color Palette
- **Background:** #E8F5F0 (mint pastel)
- **Text:** #1B3A4B (navy)
- **Accent 1:** #FFD6E0 (pink, point 1)
- **Accent 2:** #D4E8F7 (blue, point 2)
- **Accent 3:** #F0E8D4 (peach, point 3)

### Typography
- **Headline:** 48px, Bold, Navy
- **Subheading:** 28px, SemiBold, Navy
- **Body:** 18px, Regular, Navy
- **CTA:** 20px, Bold, White on navy button
- **Footer:** 12px, Regular, Navy

---

## Content Points (Infographic Body)

### Point 1: "Bé Có Thể Nghe"
**Icon:** 👂 Ear with sound waves  
**Text:** "Vùng não xử lý âm thanh đang phát triển. Bé nghe được bạn nói chuyện!"

### Point 2: "Cơ & Xương Phát Triển"
**Icon:** 💪 Flexed arm  
**Text:** "Bé sút lại mạnh = cơ bé mạnh, xương cứng. Đó là tốt!"

### Point 3: "Bé Nặng 1.2kg"
**Icon:** ⚖️ Weight scale  
**Text:** "Nặng như quả măng cụt. Còn 12 tuần để phát triển não & phổi."

---

## Export Specifications

**For Facebook:**
- Size: 1200×628px (landscape)
- Format: JPG 95% quality
- Aspect ratio: 1.9:1

**For Instagram:**
- Size: 1080×1080px (square)
- Format: JPG 95% quality
- Safe zone: Avoid text/important elements in outer 100px

**For Pinterest:**
- Size: 1000×1500px (vertical, 2:3)
- Format: PNG (with transparent corners optional)
- Text placement: Center, 40% of height

---

## Canva Integration Notes

✅ **Use Canva Template:** Search "Pregnancy Infographic" template  
✅ **Replace text:** Modify template with Vietnamese copy + points  
✅ **Keep layout:** Timeline/journey layout = highest engagement  
✅ **Export:** PNG for social (transparent), JPG for print  

**Time to recreate in Canva:** 30 minutes (vs 2+ hours from scratch)

---

## Next Steps

1. Generate in Canva using template above
2. Export as: JPG 95% quality for social
3. Upload to Buffer with Facebook copy from `copywrite-sample-facebook.md`
4. Repost to Instagram (same image, carousel format with tap-through)
5. Pin to Pinterest (vertical version, 1000×1500px)
